General.Name: TELES Informationstechnologien AG
General.Description: Arzneiwerk AG VIDA engages in the supply of pharmaceuticals for newly developed or rare medicines in Europe. The company was formerly known as TELES Aktiengesellschaft and changed its name to Arzneiwerk AG VIDA in July 2024. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Berlin, Germany.
